queue_item.summary: Confirm Tuesday 3pm meeting with Sarah Chen

input.thread:
From: Sarah Chen <sarah@example.com>
Sent: Mon
Subject: Tuesday timing

Alex, just wanted to confirm Tuesday at 3pm Pacific still works for the call. I will dial in via the Zoom link in the calendar invite. Let me know.

Thanks,
Sarah
input.stakeholder_entry: Sarah Chen, Director of Customer Success at Sentinel. Met at GSB AI conference. Active conversation about AI agents in CS workflow.
input.relationship_notes: 2026-05-19: Sent her the Substack piece on AI Observability after she asked. She replied that it was useful and wanted to schedule a follow-up.

queue_item.summary: Investor asking for Q3 ARR breakdown

input.thread:
From: Mark Reyes <investor@example.com>
Sent: Tue
Subject: Quick Q3 question

Alex, ahead of the board prep, can you send me the Q3 ARR broken out by segment (enterprise vs SMB)? Also, the net retention by cohort if you have it. I need to slot this into my model by EOD Thursday.

Mark
input.stakeholder_entry: Mark Reyes, lead investor. Quarterly board meetings. Wants numbers fast, no narrative.
input.relationship_notes: 2026-05-15: Sent him the deck for the Q2 board meeting. He flagged that ARR-by-segment cuts were not granular enough.

queue_item.summary: Founder asking about AI Observability piece

input.thread:
From: Jen Park <jen@aistartup.io>
Sent: Wed
Subject: Your Substack on observability

Alex, read your piece on AI Observability last night. Question: you mentioned 60% of AI-native respondents have agents in production. What was the split between consumer and enterprise? Curious because we are seeing very different observability needs at our portfolio companies.

Jen
input.stakeholder_entry: Jen Park, founder of an AI infra startup. Met via Substack readers. Substantive technical conversations.
input.relationship_notes: First substantive exchange. No prior interaction notes.

queue_item.summary: Cold recruiter outreach, not in active pipeline

Hi Alex, I came across your background and think you would be a fantastic fit for a Senior PM role I am working on at a Series A fintech. Quick 15 min chat this week?

Brad

From: Daniel Mercer <daniel@example.edu>

Subject: Coffee next week?

Alex, would love to catch up next week. Wednesday or Friday afternoon both work for me. Sierra Mar in Palo Alto?

Daniel
input.stakeholder_entry: Daniel Mercer, mentor and longtime GSB faculty. Met through GSB classes. High-trust relationship. Decisions on my recruiting path go through him.
input.relationship_notes: 2026-04-20: Last coffee. He suggested I anchor recruiting on Anthropic and Resolve AI as primary. I agreed.

Sent: Fri

Alex, following up on our last call. You mentioned you wanted to take a week to think about whether this fits your post-graduation arc. Where did you land? Happy to set up a chat with our CTO if you want to go deeper.

Aditya
input.stakeholder_entry: Aditya Sharma, head of product at Resolve AI. Active interview pipeline. Champion internally.
input.relationship_notes: 2026-05-18: Took the call. Aditya pitched a senior PM role. I said I needed a week to decide whether to prioritize over Anthropic. Per memory/decisions.md, decision was to keep Anthropic as primary and Resolve as strong secondary.
